RogerAI · Operating Manual Rev. 2026.06 · ((•))
RogerAI
Band Bands Spec Operating Monetize
Manual Log in Source
((•)) ON AIR · a two-way radio for GPUs

Tune in to the world's
home GPUs.

Operators put their self-hosted models on air - ham radio, for LLMs. You tune in and pay per token on the CLI. No inbound ports, no account to browse.

FIG. 1 - THE DIAL · LIVE BAND

This is the band, live right now. Tune in with one command:

FIG. 2 - TUNE IN
macOS · Linux - no account needed to browse or download a binary →
On Windows (PowerShell): irm https://rogerai.fyi/install.ps1 | iex
standing by
§1 / OPERATING PROCEDURE

Tune in. Use it. Go on air.

One CLI does both sides of the radio. Tune the band and your margins; RogerAI locks the strongest station and hands you a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint + key on 127.0.0.1. Or flip the switch and put your own GPU on air. Pick a tape below and watch it run.

FIG. 3 - THE CONSOLE · DEMO REPLAY
rogerai - the dial 


        
        

          
          
          
        

      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        §2 / THE BAND · LIVE
        
Read the band.

        
Every model is a band; every station is a home GPU serving it.
          More stations = stronger signal, faster tokens, more choice.
          Operators set their own rates. As a band fills or empties, prices
          drift. Open market, live.

      


      

        
        

          
            (())
            tuning in to the broker…
          
          
            
          
        


        
        

          band · stations
          signal
          speed
          quality
          price · out
        


        
        
    
          
  • 
          
  • 
          
  • 
          
  • 
        


        

          live from broker.rogerai.fyi/market · prices in $ / 1M tokens
        

        

          tune the dial - browse every band & station →
        

      


      
      

        RATE$0.18 - $0.55 / 1M tok
        REPLY~$0.0001 / 24 tok out
        WALLETdebited live, per token
      

    

  

  


  
  

    

      

        §3 / THE TUNE
        
Home GPUs, on the air.

        
An operator puts a model on the air at a price they set; you tune in and
          pay per token; every token is lineage-tracked. Fair, private, and
          dead-simple from either side.

      


      

        

          
go on air

          
Share a model

          
Point RogerAI at your local backend (vLLM, llama.cpp, Ollama, LM Studio). Set a call-sign,
            a rate, and your hours. Flip the switch. You are on air.

          rogerai share qwen3-coder-30b --rate 0.30
        


        

          
        


        

          
tune in

          
Use a model

          
Pick a band, set your margins (max price, min speed). RogerAI locks the strongest
            station and hands you a local OpenAI endpoint + key. When one fades, it re-tunes.

          rogerai use qwen3-coder-30b --max-price 0.30 --min-tps 40
        

      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        §4 / SPECIFICATIONS
        
Read the spec sheet.

        
The whole instrument, on one plate. No surprises behind the dial.

      


      

        

          
Protocol

          
OpenAI-compatible drop-in

        

        

          
Transport

          
Outbound long-poll no inbound ports

        

        

          
Endpoint

          
127.0.0.1 local · key-scoped

        

        

          
Pricing

          
Per token operator-set, from free, $/1M

        

        

          
Settlement

          
Wallet balance debited live, per token

        

        

          
Lineage

          
ed25519 co-signed ◆ weights · shard · token

        

        

          
Split

          
70 / 30 in the operator's favor

        

        

          
Backends

          
vLLM · llama.cpp · Ollama · LM Studio · LiteLLM · any OpenAI-compatible

        

        

          
Reach

          
Only the model port no shell, no files, no context

        

      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        §5 / OPERATING NOTES
        
Four notes before you transmit.

      


      

        

          01
          
Lock and hold

          
Tune with margins. The radio locks the strongest station and re-tunes when one fades.

        

        

          02
          
Sign every token ◆

          
A call-sign co-signs each token's lineage. ed25519, verifiable.

        

        

          03
          
Set your own rate

          
Per-token rates per model, free hours, time-of-use, usage caps. You decide.

        

        

          04
          
Only the model

          
RogerAI bridges the LLM endpoint, nothing else. No shell, files, or context. The confidential tier seals the payload.

        

      

    

  


  
  

    

      

        §6 / MONETIZE
        
Your GPU pays rent while you sleep.

        
Set a rate. Keep 70% of every token you serve. Or run open for free, plenty of
          stations broadcast for the love of the band.

        
    
          
  • + Per-input and per-output pricing, per model
    • 
          
  • + Time-of-use windows and usage caps you control
    • 
          
  • + Provably fair metering, no under-reporting, no over-charging
    • 
          
  • + 70/30 split in the operator's favor
    • 
        

      


      

        FIG. 4 - OPERATOR PANEL
        

          @you ◆
           ON AIR
        

        
modelqwen3-coder-30b

        
rate · out$0.30 / 1M

        
rate · in$0.18 / 1M

        

          est. / day
          
          $1.10 - $3.40
        

        
you'll appear in the band within ~10s

      

    

  


  
  

    

      §7 / GO
      
Pick up the mic.

      
Install the CLI. One command to go on air, or to tune in.

      
      

        On Windows (PowerShell): irm https://rogerai.fyi/install.ps1 | iex

Already on air? Pull the latest:

      
      
Or re-run the installer (it upgrades in place):

      
    

  


  
SET rogerai - REV 2026.06 - OpenAI-compatible - BSL-1.1
